_comment: Paris DispatchTrack Webhook Receiver — n8n workflow backup (sanitized). Replace <SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY> and <PARIS_DT_WEBHOOK_SECRET> with actual values. Path: /paris-dispatchtrack. Receives dispatch, route, dispatch_guide, review events from Paris DispatchTrack at https://paris.dispatchtrack.com. Live workflow must be imported and activated in n8n. PARIS tenant_client_id is fetched dynamically at runtime by slug.
name: Paris DispatchTrack Webhook Receiver

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', resource: $('Process Payload').first().json.resource, event: $('Process Payload').first().json.event, result: $('Process Payload').first().json }) }}
